title: Oscars 2026: One Battle After Another triumphs - Full results
text: The 98th Academy Awards ceremony on March 15, 2026, at the Dolby Theatre in Hollywood showcased One Battle After Another as the clear winner of the evening. Paul Thomas Anderson's film claimed six Oscars from 13 nominations, including Best Picture, Best Director, Best Adapted Screenplay, Best Supporting Actor for Sean Penn, Best Film Editing, and the newly established Best Casting award. The ceremony delivered several viral moments, including Anderson's emotional acceptance speech for Best Director, where he quipped You make a guy work hard for one of these while visibly processing his decades-long wait for the award. Michael B. Jordan's Best Actor win for Sinners created an unexpected emotional climax in the acting categories, with his victory speech emphasizing gratitude to director Ryan Coogler. Host Conan O'Brien's opening monologue and commentary throughout the evening generated social media discussion, particularly his subtle jabs at actor Timothée Chalamet regarding recent controversies. The ceremony included tributes to legendary filmmakers and recognition of the year's diverse slate of films. Red carpet coverage featured discussion of fashion moments, with attendees and celebrities expressing opinions on gowns and suits. Viewership ratings reflected sustained interest in the ceremony, indicating the Best Picture race's competitive nature drove audience engagement.
